elements.description: A typed government document with the header 'Reporting of Information on "Flying Discs."' and 'HQ. USAF - AFOIR'. The document contains numbered paragraphs (1-6) outlining Air Force policy and reporting procedures for sightings. Paragraph 6 includes a sub-list (a-g) detailing required reporting information. At the bottom, there is a signature block for 'C. P. CABELL', 'Major General, U.S.A.F.', 'Chief, Air Intel. Req. Div.', 'Directorate of Intelligence', and a table labeled 'OFFICE SYMBOL' with handwritten signatures and dates. A red 'RESTRICTED' stamp is visible at the top and bottom. A blue stamp reads 'HQ. USAF 27 FEB 1948 OAG-MAIL BRANCH'.

judge.reason: Description A mentions a 'blue stamp' while Description B provides a specific, detailed verbatim text for that stamp ('HQ. USAF 27 FEB 1948 OAG-MAIL BRANCH'), creating a direct contradiction on the quoted text content of a key visual element.
